TITLE Roasted Butternut Squash Soup

# Preheat the oven to 400F.
# Peel and roughly chop [1 item butternut squash] [1 item red onion], [2 item carrot].
# Stem and clean [3 item bell peppers].
# Top [1 head garlic]. 
# Combine all vegetables on a sheet tray. Toss with [oil] [1 tsp Black Pepper], [1 tsp ground cumin], [1 tsp paprika], [1 tsp dried thyme], [1 tsp dried rosemary], [1 tsp chili flakes].
# Cover tightly with aluminum foil. 
# Roast for 1.5 hours or until vegetables are golden and soft.
# Remove foil and roast for another few minutes to caramelize slightly.  
# Remove garlic from the tray and tranfer the vegetables to a blender. Squeeze the garlic pulp into the blender. Add [1.5 cup vegetable broth], [1 tsp [peeled ]ginger]. Blend until smooth.
# Tranfer soup to a pot, add [7 oz coconut milk] and heat through. 
# Garnish with [cilantro] and [chili oil] if desired.
